title: alyssum clastopus
intro: Alyssum clastopus, also known as mountain sweet, is a perennial flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of North America. This plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of alyssum clastopus include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and can also be used in herbal infusions and salves.
